name: Changelog

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to deliver product or repository releases by version, date, and change type, such as release notes, migration summaries, and version announcements. If the focus is business events over time rather than software versions, use timeline; for a single event, use event-card.
en.why_valuable: Plain bullet lists make it hard to distinguish additions, fixes, and breaking changes; this template establishes a stable hierarchy with a version timeline, dates, release labels, and semantic capsules such as added/fixed/breaking, so readers see risks before details.

data_in.note: Provide data.versions in display order (usually newest first). Each version contains a date, optional release label, and change rows. change.type supports added, fixed, breaking, changed, deprecated, and security; unknown types fall back to changed. date is displayed verbatim, with no time-zone or localization inference.

schema.title?: string -- changelog title; displays "Changelog" when omitted
schema.product?: string -- product or repository name above the title; displays "Product updates" when omitted
schema.versions[].date?: string -- formatted or ISO date, displayed verbatim
schema.versions[].tag?: string -- short release status, such as Latest, LTS, or Beta
schema.versions[].summary?: string -- one-sentence overview below the version title
schema.versions[].changes: object[] -- ordered change rows for the current version
schema.versions[].changes[].scope?: string -- optional module/package name, displayed as a monospace prefix

spec.note: Grows naturally by version and change row; long text wraps automatically, and below 520px the date moves beneath the version number. No vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把产品或代码库的发布记录按版本、日期和变更类型交付时用它：适合 release notes、迁移摘要和版本公告。若重点是按时间发生的业务事件而非软件版本，应使用 timeline；若只展示一场活动用 event-card。
why_valuable: 版本更新在普通项目符号里很难区分新增、修复与破坏性变更；本模板用版本时间轴、日期、release 标签和 added/fixed/breaking 等语义胶囊建立稳定层级，让读者先看到风险再读细节。

data_in.note: data.versions 按希望展示的顺序提供（通常 newest first），每个版本包含日期、可选发布标签与 change 行。change.type 支持 added、fixed、breaking、changed、deprecated、security；未知类型回退为 changed。date 按输入原样显示，不做时区或本地化推断。

schema.title?: string —— 更新记录标题；省略时显示 “Changelog”
schema.product?: string —— 标题上方的产品名或仓库名；省略时显示 “Product updates”
schema.versions[].date?: string —— 已格式化日期或 ISO 日期，按输入原样展示
schema.versions[].tag?: string —— 短发布状态，例如 Latest、LTS、Beta
schema.versions[].summary?: string —— 版本标题下方的一句概述
schema.versions[].changes: object[] —— 当前版本的有序变更行
schema.versions[].changes[].scope?: string —— 可选模块/包名，以等宽前缀显示

spec.note: 按版本和变更行自然增高；长文本自动换行，520px 以下日期移到版本号下方。无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 示例包含连续两个真实感版本组、日期、Latest 标签，以及 added、fixed、breaking、security、changed 五类变更，完整呈现风险层级。

versions.summary: Faster batch workflows with a clearer failure model.

changes.text: Added resumable uploads for payloads larger than 250 MB.
Prevented duplicate delivery after a regional failover.
Removed the deprecated X-Orbit-Key header; use Bearer tokens.
Reduced default service-token lifetime to 24 hours.
Request IDs now appear in every structured error response.

uplink: display-only：发布记录仅供浏览，不包含订阅、确认或升级操作，也不向 AI 回传展开状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
